props.name: rows
props.description: Typed rows rendered deterministically as item, link, group, or divider entries. Link rows support router-style composition through `as` and `linkProps`.

props.name: showDividers
props.description: Display dividers above items when appropriate.

props.name: role
props.description: ARIA role describing list semantics such as listbox or menu.

props.name: heading
props.description: Optional heading model for the list title.
